face_exercises.name: Mouth Open
face_exercises.description: Open your mouth as wide as possible, then close it slowly. Repeat the movement in a controlled manner.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Open your mouth wide. Close it slowly. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Smile
face_exercises.description: Smile as wide as you can, stretching your lips to the sides. Hold briefly, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Smile wide stretching your lips. Relax. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Blink
face_exercises.description: Blink your eyes forcefully, squeezing them shut, then open wide. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Blink forcefully. Squeeze eyes shut then open wide. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Eyebrow Raise
face_exercises.description: Raise both eyebrows as high as possible. Hold for a moment, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise your eyebrows high. Hold. Relax. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Lip Pucker
face_exercises.description: Pucker your lips as if giving a kiss. Hold for a moment, then relax. Repeat.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Pucker your lips forward like a kiss. Hold. Relax. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Left Wink
face_exercises.description: Wink your left eye while keeping the right eye open. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Wink your left eye. Keep right eye open. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Right Wink
face_exercises.description: Wink your right eye while keeping the left eye open. Repeat at a steady pace.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Wink your right eye. Keep left eye open. Repeat.

face_exercises.name: Jaw Shift
face_exercises.description: Shift your jaw to the left, then to the right, then back to center. Repeat the full cycle.
face_exercises.voiceInstruction: Shift your jaw left, then right, then center. Repeat.

body_exercises.name: Jumping Jacks
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet together and arms at sides. Jump while spreading legs and raising arms overhead. Return to start.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Jump and spread your legs while raising arms overhead. Jump back to start.

body_exercises.name: Squats
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart. Lower your body as if sitting in a chair. Keep your back straight.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Stand with feet shoulder width apart. Lower down as if sitting. Keep your back straight.

body_exercises.name: High Knees
body_exercises.description: Stand in place and run, bringing your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms for momentum.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Run in place. Bring your knees up to hip level. Pump your arms.

body_exercises.name: Arm Raises
body_exercises.description: Stand with arms at your sides. Raise both arms straight in front until above shoulder height. Lower slowly.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise both arms in front above shoulder height. Lower slowly. Repeat.

body_exercises.name: Pushups
body_exercises.description: Start in plank position. Lower your body until chest nearly touches the floor. Push back up.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Start in plank position. Lower your chest to the floor. Push back up.

body_exercises.name: Standing Knee Raises
body_exercises.description: Stand tall. Raise one knee to chest height, then switch legs. Keep alternating in a controlled manner.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Raise one knee to chest. Switch legs. Keep alternating.

body_exercises.name: Side Steps
body_exercises.description: Stand with feet together. Step wide to one side, then bring feet together. Alternate sides.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Step wide to one side, then together. Alternate sides.

body_exercises.name: Plank
body_exercises.description: Hold a push-up position with arms straight. Keep your body in a straight line. Engage your core.
body_exercises.voiceInstruction: Get into push up position. Keep your body straight. Engage your core. Hold.
